notes.workflows: release.yml builds binaries for 4 targets (x86_64/aarch64 linux-musl + x86_64/aarch64 apple-darwin), multi-arch Docker images (amd64+arm64), and creates GitHub Release with checksums. deps.yml runs weekly cargo audit, cargo outdated, and toolchain version check.
notes.terraform: AWS-based: single EC2 instance with EBS persistent volume, security group, optional EIP and SSH. Secrets passed via TF_VAR_ environment variables. fly.toml provides Fly.io alternative with health checks and auto-scaling.
notes.makefile: 22 phony targets covering build/test/check, docker, cross-compilation release, terraform, fly.io, and utilities. Default target is help with self-documenting target descriptions.
